description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find an evening opera performance happening next calendar month with tickets under $50 each, and add 2 adjacent seats for the cheapest such performance to the cart.

tasks.instruction: On a Saturday, select an afternoon backstage tour between 12:00 PM and 4:00 PM and an evening opera performance on the same date starting after 6:00 PM, and add 1 ticket for each to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Within an active opera festival schedule, add 1 masterclass, 1 talk or lecture, and 2 performances costing $25 or less each to your personal schedule, ensuring none of the event times overlap and that at least one performance is on a different day from the others.

target_names: Talk: The Future of Opera Staging

tasks.instruction: Search the learning resources for “bel canto”, filter to articles and videos of 15 minutes or less, sort by highest rating, and add the first three results to your reading list.
